goal: Create a Figma plugin panel that renames selected messy layers using team naming rules.
doneWhen: Plugin panel explains the selected-layer rename action.
Empty selection and invalid layer-name states are covered.
doNotBuild: Do not turn this into a normal website.
Do not add unrelated design-system management.
allowedAssumptions: Default to manual review before applying changes.
continueIf: The panel is rough but the selected-layer flow is present.
stopWhen: The builder swaps Figma context for a generic web app.
askHumanIf: The exact naming convention needs team approval.
smallestRepair: Restore the Figma plugin panel and selected-layer rename flow before adding anything else.
